calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Shockey for and with Pamela Aragon (Successor Trustee). Donald Mah for James Ortega. Yvonne Webb in Propria Persona.

Mr. Shockey addressed payment to Ms. Webb, and explained the circumstances, services and efforts to support payment to Mr. Ortega. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Final Accounting By Denise Enos
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Continued To Feb-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Larry Shockey and the Successor Trustee Pamela Aragon to appear on February 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the accounting or the waivers have not been filed. Status of Denise Enos' accounting was continued to February 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Final Accounting By Denise Enos
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Shockey for Pamela Aragon (Trustee).

Mr. Shockey stated that the Beneficiaries are willing to waive the accounting but that he does not have the formal waivers. In addition, Mr. Shockey stated that the Bonding Company was paid out of escrow. Status of the final account was continued to January 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Final Accounting By Denise Enos
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Jul-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A notice to appear will be issued to Denise Enos (Propria Persona) to appear on July 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. , in Dept. 204 to explain why there was no appearance today and why the accounting has not been filed. The matter was continued to July 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Final Accounting By Denise Enos
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Continued To Jun-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Shockey for James Ortega (Petitioner). Denise Enos in Propria Persona.

Mr. Shockey stated that he received possession of the Delano Avenue property, that the foreclosure sale is scheduled for April 28, 2011 and that he is in communication with Bank of Amercia regarding an extension. In addition, Mr. Shockey stated that he has not received an accounting, that he was willing to assist Ms. Enos and requested a list of the Probate Paralegals. The matter was continued to June 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of Ms. Enos' accounting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Accounting By The Denise Enos, Former Trustee, And Hearing On The Amendment To The Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, And Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Text Ruling

Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Apr-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Shockey for James Ortega. Denise Enos in pro per. Debbie Muro in pro per.

The Court stated that the matter had been continued two weeks because a competing petition was to be filed by Denise Enos. Ms. Muro stated that a competing petition was not filed. Mr. Shockey stated that he is prepared to go forward, that the bond should be $309,000.00 not $390,000.00, that Mr. Fazio is here with the bond, that there is a realtor here today as well, and that if he receives the order today he can contact Bank of America. Ms. Enos stated that they are still living in the home and inquired as to whether or not they will get time to move. The Court stated that issue should be worked out with Mr. Shockey. The Court then granted the petition (subject to review of the order). In addition, the Court set status on the filing of the final accounting by Denise Enos for April 18, 2011.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Accounting By The Denise Enos, Former Trustee, And Hearing On The Amendment To The Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, And Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Mar-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Shockey for Petitioner. Denise Enos in Propria Persona. Debbie Muro also present.

Ms. Enos stated that she did not have the resources to pay someone to prepare the accounting. Ms. Muro objected to Pamela Aragon being appointed. The matter was continued to March 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status filing of a competing petition by Ms. Muro. If a competing petition is not filed, Pamela Aragon will be appointed on March 14, 2011 with bond set at $390,000.00.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Mar-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Accounting By The Denise Enos, Former Trustee, And Hearing On The Amendment To The Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, And Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Jan-31-2011 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Shockey for James Ortega. Denise Enos in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that today's matter needed to be continued as it requires 30 days notice. Ms. Enos stated that she has the accounting but that it is not in proper form. The Court provided a list of Probate Paralegals to assist with the accounting. Mr. Shockey stated that they were able to continue the foreclosure sale for two months, spoke of the liens, the line of credit and stated that he did not know if rents were paid. The matter was continued to February 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Continued To Jan-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Shockey for James Ortega (Petitioner). Denise Enos (Trustee) in propria persona.

Ms. Enos stated that she couldn't afford an attorney. Mr. Shockey presented argument in support of the petition, stated that they had given notice to everyone, that even though they hadn't spoken to everyone that the family seems to agree that the house needs to be sold and the proceeds distributed, and that he never received an accounting from Ms. Enos. The Court suspended Ms. Enos powers, ordered Ms. Enos to account, and stated that it was not making any ruling as to the constructive trust. Mr. Shockey stated that if the parties can agree on a trustee that he will submit that in advance of the next hearing. The Court stated that Mr. Shockey should file an amendment to the petition naming someone as the proposed Successor Trustee. In addition, the Court ordered Ms. Enos to file her accounting by the end of business on January 26, 2011. Status on the filing of the accounting by Ms. Enos and the hearing on the amendment to the petition naming the Successor Trustee is set for January 31, 2011. Mr. Shockey is to designate another Trustee and is to acquire their consent to serve. The Court stated that if Mr. Shockey needs to proceed immediately that he may apply by ex-parte. Mr. Shockey is to prepare today's order. Mr. Shockey stated that there are two mortgages, that both mortgages are in default, that they are heading to foreclosure, that they are having trouble getting information, and that there were issues with B of A and compliance with the subpoena, but that matter has been resolved.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

Petition For Accounting And Removal Of Successor Trustee, Appointment Of New Successor
Off Calendar Oct-25-2010 Continued To Dec-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
